image3.notes: Hand-read by user 2026-07-08. Numbered marks are cm (mark '4' = 40 mm), smallest main tick = 1 mm, vernier resolution 0.1 mm (10 over 9), reading taken at vernier 0 mark.

image2.notes: Hand-read by user 2026-07-08. High-res capture (3024x4032) with perforated-panel background; processed at downscale=3. Vernier 0 sits at ~16.1 mm (between the 10 mm and 20 mm numbered marks).
